title: Foxxys Fixed Saplings
description: Alters the drop rates of Jungle, Pale oak and Dark Oak saplings
body:
This small pack aims to fix sapling drop rates of a few specific tree types.

Jungle Saplings have had their drop rate changed to be in line with other Vanilla Sapling drop rates

Pale Oak and Dark Oak Sapling drop rates have been doubled to prevent the saplings potentially being lost when growning trees

A version which only changes the jungle sapling drop rates can be found here:
https://modrinth.com/datapack/foxxys_fixed_saplings_jungle_edition
